common.page_not_found: The requested page could not be found.

home.headline: Compress and convert images without sending a byte anywhere.
home.subheadline: A focused toolkit for reducing file size and switching formats locally in the browser. No uploads. No waiting on servers. No hidden retention.
home.feature_1_desc: Tune size, width, and quality while keeping the UI responsive with web workers.
home.feature_2_desc: Transform PNG, JPEG, and WebP locally with canvas-based export controls.
home.principle_1: Local-only processing keeps source files on the device.
home.principle_2: Batch-oriented flows support one-by-one or all-at-once work.
home.principle_3: Shared components keep compress and convert behavior consistent.

compress.meta_desc: Reduce image file sizes locally in your browser.
compress.title: Make oversized images practical.
compress.description: Reduce heavy assets locally with a controlled, sequential workflow designed to stay responsive even when you process batches.
compress.empty_state: No images yet. Add files above to start compressing.

convert.meta_desc: Convert image formats locally in your browser.
convert.title: Switch formats without losing control.
convert.description: Convert image formats locally and keep transparent control over output type, quality, and download handling.
convert.empty_state: No images yet. Add files above to start converting.
convert.settings_desc: Choose the export format and quality.
convert.png_lossless: PNG export is lossless. Quality control is hidden because browsers do not use the quality parameter for PNG encoding.

dropzone.title: Drop files here or browse from your device.
dropzone.description: Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Files stay local to the browser, and you can process up to 20 images in one session.
